title: Pulling item Updates into Zapier to update a column in Monday
excerpt:

Goal is to have the most recent update displayed in a column. However, I’m not abl…

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is what I’m trying to do:

  1. When there’s a new update on an item via a conversation.

  2. Populate a long text column in Monday.

Goal is to have the most recent update displayed in a column. However, I’m not able to pull any data from Updates into Zapier. Is this a limitation or has anyone done this?

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cphu , this is a simple automation with zzBots. I built a bot in my workspace that will update the Long Text column with every new comment on that item. (Screenshot)

If your interested or need help setting up, just chat with us on our website : https://www.zzbots.com/

image856×1373 66.4 KB

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! But I won’t be able to buy any new tools for this.

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Depending on how many comments you make you could potentially use the free plan for this. You get 100 free Bot Power per month. This automation will cost 1 Bot Power per comment.

If you end up needing more automation, then this tool could become worth it to upgrade to.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cphu ,

Did you tried Make.com ?

You can trigger the Make.com scenario when an Update is created , and you can update the long text column in Monday.com .

Example images :-

When a comment is created

image1538×552 66.1 KB

Trigger update and update Long text column

image1029×517 38 KB

Long text column updated

image1566×538 33.2 KB

This only cost 2 operations / comments .

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml: You can do this easily with monday’s workflow builder, without need of Zapier

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: How would you do this using Monday workflows? And without third-party apps?

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml: Screenshot 2024-08-12 at 11.42.28 PM2940×1388 210 KB

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: Are you using a different type of automation? I don’t have the same option. I’m on the Enterprise plan.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am talking about workflows builder, not custom automation builder

See this to proper understanding of monday workflows (which are very very powerful than simple automations) - https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/11065311570066-Get-started-monday-workflows
